step_rationale: NET-associated marker; neutrophil extracellular trap component correlating with thrombotic burden.
mechanism: Nucleosome complexes released in neutrophil extracellular traps promote platelet activation and thrombus formation at the site of plaque rupture.

references.title: The Time Course of Markers of Neutrophil Extracellular Traps in Patients Undergoing Revascularisation for Acute Myocardial Infarction or Stable Angina Pectoris.
